title: 10 best herbal creams for open wounds
description: Sage creams helps with open wounds because of its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's active compounds, such as rosmarinic acid and camphor, work to reduce bacterial growth, preventing infection and promoting a healthy environment for wound healing. Additionally, sage's antioxidant properties help to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair, accelerating the wound closure process.
